channel.title: healthy-light-meals Posts - RSS Feed
channel.description: Fresh healthy-light-meals posts and cooking inspiration

item.title: Creamy Chocolate Peanut Butter Protein Smoothie for Quick Energy Boost
item.description: This smoothie is a delicious blend of chocolate and peanut butter that keeps you full and energized. It’s creamy and naturally sweet without added sugar. Great for breakfast or after workouts!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 5 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 1

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup unsweetened almond milk, chilled
  • 2 tablespoons natural peanut butter
  • 1 scoop chocolate protein powder
  • 1/2 frozen banana
  • 1 tablespoon unsweetened cocoa powder
  • Ice cubes, optional for thickness

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #unsweetened #natural #scoop

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Creamy Chocolate Peanut Butter Protein Smoothie for Quick Energy Boost
media:content.media:description: This smoothie is a delicious blend of chocolate and peanut butter that keeps you full and energized. It’s creamy and naturally sweet without added sugar. Great for breakfast or after workouts!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230636499, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, unsweetened, natural, scoop

item.title: Tropical Mango Smoothie Bowl with Coconut & Kiwi - Fresh & Easy
item.description: This mango smoothie bowl is like sunshine in a bowl! Creamy, tropical mango blends with crunchy coconut flakes and tangy kiwi for a refreshing start. Perfect for busy mornings or a light afternoon boost.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 1/2 cups frozen mango chunks
  • 1/2 cup Greek yogurt, plain and cold
  • 1/4 cup coconut milk
  • 1 tablespoon honey or maple syrup (optional)
  • 1 kiwi, peeled and sliced
  • 2 tablespoons unsweetened coconut flakes
  • 1 tablespoon chia seeds (optional)
  • Fresh mint leaves for garnish (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #frozen #greek #coconut

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Tropical Mango Smoothie Bowl with Coconut & Kiwi - Fresh & Easy
media:content.media:description: This mango smoothie bowl is like sunshine in a bowl! Creamy, tropical mango blends with crunchy coconut flakes and tangy kiwi for a refreshing start. Perfect for busy mornings or a light afternoon boost.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230636499, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, frozen, greek, coconut

item.title: Bright and Creamy Mango Pineapple Smoothie Bowl with Coconut Flakes
item.description: This tropical smoothie bowl is bursting with fresh mango and pineapple flavors, topped with crunchy coconut flakes for a delightful texture. It’s a refreshing way to start your day or enjoy a light snack when you want something bright and satisfying.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup frozen mango chunks
  • 1 cup frozen pineapple chunks
  • 1/2 cup Greek yogurt, plain
  • 1/4 cup coconut milk
  • 1 tablespoon honey or maple syrup (optional)
  • 2 tablespoons shredded coconut flakes
  • Fresh fruit and seeds for topping (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #frozen #greek

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Bright and Creamy Mango Pineapple Smoothie Bowl with Coconut Flakes
media:content.media:description: This tropical smoothie bowl is bursting with fresh mango and pineapple flavors, topped with crunchy coconut flakes for a delightful texture. It’s a refreshing way to start your day or enjoy a light snack when you want something bright and satisfying.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230636499, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, frozen, greek

item.title: Green Power Smoothie with Spinach and Chia Seeds for Natural Energy Boost
item.description: This vibrant green smoothie blends fresh spinach with chia seeds for a creamy texture and natural energy lift. It’s packed with protein but low on sugar, making it perfect to kick-start your morning or recharge after a workout.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 cups fresh spinach, washed and packed
  • 1 banana, peeled and sliced
  • 1 cup unsweetened almond milk
  • 2 tablespoons chia seeds
  • 1 tablespoon natural peanut butter
  • 1 teaspoon honey (optional)
  • 1/2 cup plain Greek yogurt
  • Ice cubes (optional, for thickness)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #fresh #banana #unsweetened

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Green Power Smoothie with Spinach and Chia Seeds for Natural Energy Boost
media:content.media:description: This vibrant green smoothie blends fresh spinach with chia seeds for a creamy texture and natural energy lift. It’s packed with protein but low on sugar, making it perfect to kick-start your morning or recharge after a workout.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230636499, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, fresh, banana, unsweetened

item.title: Healthy Chicken Meal Prep Bowls with Fresh Veggies and Flavorful Marinade
item.description: These chicken meal prep bowls are packed with lean protein and crisp veggies, making them perfect for busy days when you want something healthy but satisfying. The simple marinade really brings it all together and keeps it fresh!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1.5 pounds boneless, skinless chicken breasts, cut into bite-size pieces
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 tablespoon soy sauce
  • 1 tablespoon lemon juice
  • 1 teaspoon honey
  • 1 teaspoon smoked paprika
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • 2 cups cooked brown rice
  • 1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved
  • 1 cup cucumber, diced
  • 1 cup steamed broccoli florets
  • Fresh parsley, chopped (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #olive #cloves

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Healthy Chicken Meal Prep Bowls with Fresh Veggies and Flavorful Marinade
media:content.media:description: These chicken meal prep bowls are packed with lean protein and crisp veggies, making them perfect for busy days when you want something healthy but satisfying. The simple marinade really brings it all together and keeps it fresh!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230636499, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, boneless, olive, cloves

item.title: Easy 30-Minute Chicken Stir Fry with Fresh Veggies and Juicy Marinade
item.description: This stir fry is my go-to for busy nights—light, packed with protein, and loaded with fresh veggies. The secret? A quick marinade that keeps the chicken juicy without extra calories. Perfect for a healthy dinner that’s ready in no time!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 lb boneless skinless chicken breasts, thinly sliced
  • 2 tablespoons soy sauce
  • 1 tablespoon rice vinegar
  • 1 tablespoon honey
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 teaspoon grated fresh ginger
  • 1 red bell pepper, thinly sliced
  • 1 cup broccoli florets
  • 1 medium carrot, julienned
  • 1 small onion, sliced
  • 2 tablespoons vegetable oil
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • 1 teaspoon cornstarch mixed with 2 tablespoons water (optional for sauce thickening)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #sauce #tablespoon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:description: This stir fry is my go-to for busy nights—light, packed with protein, and loaded with fresh veggies. The secret? A quick marinade that keeps the chicken juicy without extra calories. Perfect for a healthy dinner that’s ready in no time!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230636499, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, boneless, sauce, tablespoon

item.title: Energizing Green Spinach Smoothie with Lemon and Ginger Kick
item.description: This green smoothie is my go-to for a quick energy boost. The fresh spinach blends perfectly with zesty lemon and a touch of ginger, making it refreshing and light. Great for mornings or after workouts!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 5 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 cups fresh spinach leaves, washed
  • 1 medium lemon, juiced
  • 1 teaspoon fresh ginger, grated
  • 1 cup cold water
  • 1 tablespoon honey or maple syrup (optional)
  • 1/2 cup ice cubes

👩‍🍳 Instructions

item.title: Easy Creamy Greek Yogurt Chicken Dinner Ready in 30 Minutes
item.description: This creamy chicken dinner uses Greek yogurt to keep things light yet satisfying. It’s perfect for busy weeknights when you crave comfort without heaviness. Plus, it’s done in just half an hour!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 lb boneless skinless chicken breasts, cut into bite-sized pieces
  • 1 tablespoon olive oil
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 small onion, finely chopped
  • 1 cup Greek yogurt (full-fat or low-fat)
  • 1/2 cup chicken broth
  • 1 teaspoon dried oregano
  • 1/2 teaspoon paprika
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • Fresh parsley, chopped (for garnish)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #tablespoon #cloves

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Easy Creamy Greek Yogurt Chicken Dinner Ready in 30 Minutes
media:content.media:description: This creamy chicken dinner uses Greek yogurt to keep things light yet satisfying. It’s perfect for busy weeknights when you crave comfort without heaviness. Plus, it’s done in just half an hour!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230636499, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, boneless, tablespoon, cloves

item.title: Fresh Herb and Garlic Marinated Chicken for a Light Dinner
item.description: This light chicken dish is packed with fresh herbs and garlic, making every bite flavorful and juicy. The secret lies in marinating the chicken just long enough to keep it tender. Perfect for a healthy weeknight dinner!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 1/2 pounds boneless, skinless chicken breasts
  • 3 tablespoons olive oil
  • 4 cloves garlic, minced
  • 2 tablespoons fresh parsley, chopped
  • 1 tablespoon fresh thyme leaves
  • 1 tablespoon fresh rosemary, chopped
  • Juice of 1 lemon
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #olive #cloves

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

media:content.media:title: Fresh Herb and Garlic Marinated Chicken for a Light Dinner
media:content.media:description: This light chicken dish is packed with fresh herbs and garlic, making every bite flavorful and juicy. The secret lies in marinating the chicken just long enough to keep it tender. Perfect for a healthy weeknight dinner!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230636499, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, boneless, olive, cloves

item.title: Sheet Pan Lamb with Roasted Artichokes: A Mediterranean Weeknight Winner
item.description: This sheet pan lamb dinner combines tender lamb and earthy roasted artichokes for a simple yet flavorful meal. The artichokes roast up beautifully, soaking in the herbs and juices. Perfect for a healthy weeknight dinner that feels special without fuss.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1.5 pounds lamb shoulder, trimmed and cut into chunks
  • 2 large artichokes, trimmed and quartered
  • 3 tablespoons olive oil, divided
  • 3 garlic cloves, minced
  • 1 tablespoon fresh rosemary, chopped
  • 1 tablespoon fresh thyme leaves
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 1 lemon, zested and juiced
  • Optional: 1 teaspoon smoked paprika

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #shoulder #large #olive

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Sheet Pan Lamb with Roasted Artichokes: A Mediterranean Weeknight Winner
media:content.media:description: This sheet pan lamb dinner combines tender lamb and earthy roasted artichokes for a simple yet flavorful meal. The artichokes roast up beautifully, soaking in the herbs and juices. Perfect for a healthy weeknight dinner that feels special without fuss.

item.title: Fresh Strawberry Spinach Salad with Zesty Lemon Dressing for Quick Lunches
item.description: This strawberry spinach salad is my go-to when I want something fresh and light. The lemon dressing adds a bright zing that really wakes up the flavors. Perfect for a quick lunch or a colorful side at dinner!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 5 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 6 cups fresh baby spinach leaves, washed and dried
  • 1 pint fresh strawberries, hulled and sliced
  • 1/4 cup sliced almonds, toasted
  • 1/4 cup crumbled feta cheese
  • For the dressing:
  • 3 tablespoons fresh lemon juice
  • 2 tablespoons extra virgin olive oil
  • 1 tablespoon honey
  • 1 teaspoon Dijon mustard
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #fresh #sliced

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Fresh Strawberry Spinach Salad with Zesty Lemon Dressing for Quick Lunches
media:content.media:description: This strawberry spinach salad is my go-to when I want something fresh and light. The lemon dressing adds a bright zing that really wakes up the flavors. Perfect for a quick lunch or a colorful side at dinner!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230636499, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, fresh, sliced

item.title: Quick Lemon Asparagus and Spinach Salad with Feta That Brightens Any Meal
item.description: This fresh salad combines tender asparagus and spinach with tangy lemon and creamy feta. It’s a speedy, healthy side that livens up lunch or dinner. I love the zing the lemon adds—it’s perfect for spring and summer meals!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 10 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 bunch asparagus, trimmed and cut into 2-inch pieces
  • 4 cups fresh baby spinach
  • 1/2 cup crumbled feta cheese
  • 1 lemon, zested and juiced
  • 2 tablespoons extra virgin olive oil
  • 1 teaspoon honey or maple syrup
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 1/4 cup toasted pine nuts (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #bunch #fresh #crumbled

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Quick Lemon Asparagus and Spinach Salad with Feta That Brightens Any Meal
media:content.media:description: This fresh salad combines tender asparagus and spinach with tangy lemon and creamy feta. It’s a speedy, healthy side that livens up lunch or dinner. I love the zing the lemon adds—it’s perfect for spring and summer meals!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230636499, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, bunch, fresh, crumbled

item.title: Light Artichoke and Lemon Quinoa Bowl for Spring: Fresh and Bright Flavors
item.description: This light quinoa bowl combines tangy lemon and tender artichokes for a refreshing spring meal. It’s bright, easy to make, and perfect for lunch or a light dinner when you want something fresh and satisfying.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 20 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup quinoa, rinsed and drained
  • 2 cups water or vegetable broth
  • 1 cup marinated artichoke hearts, chopped
  • 1 lemon, zested and juiced
  • 1/4 cup fresh parsley, chopped
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 1 garlic clove, minced
  • Salt and black pepper to taste
  • Optional: 1/4 cup toasted pine nuts or slivered almonds

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #quinoa #water #marinated

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

item.title: Healthy Pea and Radish Spring Soup in 20 Minutes
item.description: This bright, fresh soup combines sweet peas and crisp radishes for a light, healthy meal you can whip up in just 20 minutes. The secret? A quick sauté and blending that keeps all the spring flavors vibrant. Perfect for a light lunch or starter on a sunny day.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 10 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 tablespoons olive oil, extra virgin
  • 1 small onion, finely chopped
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 4 cups fresh or frozen peas
  • 1 cup radishes, sliced thin
  • 4 cups vegetable broth
  • 1/4 cup fresh mint leaves, chopped
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • Juice of half a lemon

👩‍🍳 Instructions

item.description: This roasted asparagus gets a nutty twist from Parmesan and a fresh zing from lemon zest. Roasting keeps it tender but crisp, making it perfect for a quick side or festive dinner addition.

item.content:encoded:

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

item.title: Zesty Garlic Lemon Asparagus Stir-Fry Ready in 15 Minutes
item.description: Fresh asparagus sautéed with garlic and a splash of lemon juice delivers a bright, healthy side dish that’s quick to make. I love how the citrus lifts the earthy flavor, perfect for busy spring evenings!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 5 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 10 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 lb fresh asparagus, trimmed and cut into 2-inch pieces
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 lemon, zested and juiced
  • Salt, to taste
  • Freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • Optional: red pepper flakes for a little heat

item.title: Bright and Zesty Lemon Herb Grilled Salmon for Easy Weeknight Dinners
item.description: This lemon herb grilled salmon is a quick and healthy dinner that bursts with fresh, vibrant flavors. The lemony marinade with fragrant herbs keeps it light yet filling—ideal for any night you want something simple but special.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 salmon fillets, skin on, about 6 ounces each
  • 3 tablespoons fresh lemon juice
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 tablespoon fresh dill, chopped
  • 1 tablespoon fresh parsley, chopped
  • 1 teaspoon honey
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
  • Lemon wedges for serving

👩‍🍳 Instructions

media:content.media:title: Bright and Zesty Lemon Herb Grilled Salmon for Easy Weeknight Dinners
media:content.media:description: This lemon herb grilled salmon is a quick and healthy dinner that bursts with fresh, vibrant flavors. The lemony marinade with fragrant herbs keeps it light yet filling—ideal for any night you want something simple but special.

item.title: Refreshing Green Smoothie with Creamy Avocado and Kale Boost
item.description: This green smoothie is a creamy, nutrient-packed blend of avocado and kale that’s perfect for a quick detox. It’s super easy to make and great for mornings or after workouts.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 ripe avocado, peeled and pitted
  • 2 cups fresh kale leaves, stems removed
  • 1 cup unsweetened almond milk
  • 1 medium banana, peeled
  • 1 tablespoon fresh lemon juice
  • 1 teaspoon honey or maple syrup (optional)
  • 1/2 cup ice cubes

item.title: Light and Zesty Spring Quinoa Salad with Toasted Quinoa Flavor
item.description: This quinoa salad is fresh and bright, packed with crisp spring veggies and a lemony dressing. Toasting the quinoa first gives it a lovely nutty flavor. Great for a light lunch or side on warm days!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 20 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup quinoa, rinsed and drained
  • 1 3/4 cups water
  • 1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved
  • 1 cup cucumber, diced
  • 1/2 cup radishes, thinly sliced
  • 1/4 cup red onion, finely chopped
  • 1/4 cup fresh parsley, chopped
  • Juice of 1 lemon
  • 3 tablespoons olive oil
  • 1 teaspoon honey or maple syrup
  • Salt and pepper to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

item.title: Bright and Fresh Pea and Mint Soup Ready in 30 Minutes
item.description: This pea and mint soup is light and refreshing, perfect for a quick lunch or a spring starter. The fresh mint gives it a lovely twist, and it comes together in just half an hour—super easy and satisfying!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 20 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 tablespoon olive oil, cold-pressed
  • 1 medium onion, finely chopped
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 4 cups fresh or frozen peas
  • 3 cups vegetable broth, low sodium
  • 1/2 cup fresh mint leaves, packed
  • Salt to taste
  • Freshly ground black pepper to taste

item.title: Silky Spring Pea Soup with Fresh Mint for a Light, Comforting Lunch
item.description: This spring pea soup is so fresh and silky, brightened with mint for a little zing. It’s super quick to make and perfect for a light lunch or a cozy starter when you want something comforting but not heavy.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 medium onion, chopped
  • 2 cups fresh or frozen peas
  • 3 cups vegetable broth
  • 1/2 cup fresh mint leaves, loosely packed
  • 1/4 cup heavy cream or coconut cream
  • Salt and pepper to taste

item.title: Fresh Zucchini Noodle Salad with Bright Lemon Dressing for Quick Lunches
item.description: This zucchini noodle salad is a refreshing, light dish that’s perfect when you want something crisp and easy. The zingy lemon dressing really wakes up the flavors, making it ideal for a quick lunch or a vibrant side.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 medium zucchinis, spiralized into noodles
  • 1/4 cup fresh lemon juice
  • 2 tablespoons extra virgin olive oil
  • 1 teaspoon honey or maple syrup
  • 1/4 teaspoon salt
  • Freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 2 tablespoons chopped fresh basil or parsley
  • 1/4 cup cherry tomatoes, halved (optional)
